---
title: "Workflow title"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Context

Explain when to use this workflow.

## Prerequisites

- expected package version
- input assumptions

## Step-by-step

```{r}
#| eval: false
# library(REPO)
# inputs <- prepare_inputs(...)
# output <- run_analysis(inputs)
```

## Common pitfalls

- pitfall one and how to avoid it
- pitfall two and how to diagnose it

## Related reference

- link to relevant functions in `reference/`
